headline: What’s Cantor Fitzgerald Saying About Willis Towers Watson (WTW)?
summary: Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (NASDAQ:WTW) is one of billionaire David Abrams’ best stock picks. Wall Street also recommends Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (NASDAQ:WTW). The stock has a consensus Buy rating and an average price target of $358.08, which indicates nearly 30% upside. On April 9, Cantor Fitzgerald cut its price target […]
